message.content:
@startuml
title 七並べシーケンス図（一周）ver.3

participant App
participant Game
participant Player
participant View
participant TableView
participant PlayersListView

App -> Game : startRound()
Game -> Player : startTurn()

== ターン進行 ==

Game -> Player : [playersListを回す]

== ターン終了 ==

Game -> View : render(playersList,table)
View -> TableView : render(table)
View -> PlayersListView : render(playersList)

Game -> Game : cleanUpPlayersList()

App -> Game : isEnd()
Game --> App : boolean

alt [true]
    App -> Game : endGame()
else [false]
    App -> Game : startRound()
end

@enduml
